Class ParsedSoundImpl

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.audio.impl.io.ParsedSoundImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class ParsedSoundImpl extends Object implements NonThrowingAutoCloseable
An intermediate representation of a loaded sound (in PCM) which is ready to be converted into any of:
  • a stand-alone SoundBuffer;
  • a list of SoundBuffers;
  • a SoundBufferProvider that generates buffers from the loaded data.

  • Constructor Details

    • ParsedSoundImpl

      public ParsedSoundImpl()

  • Method Details

    • fromPublicAPI

      public static ParsedSoundImpl fromPublicAPI(long alcContext, ParsedSound ps)
      Converts a ParsedSound record to a ParsedSoundImpl instance.
      Parameters:
      alcContext - the ALC context handle
      ps - the source object
      Returns:
      a new ParsedSoundImpl instance

    • createStandAloneBuffer

      public SoundBuffer createStandAloneBuffer()
      Creates and returns a stand-alone SoundBuffer from this instance. The data buffer is cloned, so the created buffer will be independent of this instance.
      Returns:
      a stand-alone SoundBuffer from this parsed sound

    • createBuffersByCount

      public List<SoundBuffer> createBuffersByCount(int maxBufferCount)
      Creates and returns a list of SoundBuffers from this instance, given the maximal buffer count. The returned list will have at most the given count of sound buffers. The data buffer is cloned, so the created buffers will be independent of this instance.
      Parameters:
      maxBufferCount - the maximal buffer count, must be positive
      Returns:
      a list of sound buffers from this parsed sound

    • createBuffersBySize

      public List<SoundBuffer> createBuffersBySize(int maxBufferSize)
      Creates and returns a list of SoundBuffers from this instance, given the maximal buffer size. Every sound buffer in the returned list will have at most the given count of samples multiplied by the channel count. The data buffer is cloned, so the created buffers will be independent of this instance.
      Parameters:
      maxBufferSize - the maximal buffer size for each buffer (will be multiplied by the channel count), must be positive
      Returns:
      a list of sound buffers from this parsed sound

    • createProvider

      public SoundBufferProvider createProvider(int maxBufferSize, boolean mustLoop)
      Creates and returns a SoundBufferProvider from this instance, given the maximal buffer size, and whether the provider should loop. Each buffer emitted by the provider will have at most the given count of samples multiplied by the channel count.
      Parameters:
      maxBufferSize - the maximal buffer size
      mustLoop - whether the provider must loop
      Returns:
      a new SoundBufferProvider from this parsed sound

    • getPcmData

      public ShortBuffer getPcmData()
      Returns the underlying PCM data buffer.
      Returns:
      the PCM data

    • length

      public int length()
      Returns the total sound length, in samples.
      Returns:
      the sound length

    • channels

      public int channels()
      Returns the channel count of this sound.
      Returns:
      the channel count

    • close

      public void close()
      Releases all associated resources of this instance. The instance cannot be used to create buffers after call to this method. Calling this method more than once has no effect.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
